record_types.name: SYST_CALIB_Register
SYST_CSR_Register
SYST_CVR_Register
SYST_RVR_Register

variables.name: SYST_CALIB
variables.code:
SYST_CALIB : SYST_CALIB_Register
  with Import,
       Volatile,
       Full_Access_Only,
       Address => System.Storage_Elements.To_Address (16#E000_E01C#);

variables.name: SYST_CSR
variables.code:
SYST_CSR   : SYST_CSR_Register
  with Import,
       Volatile,
       Full_Access_Only,
       Address => System.Storage_Elements.To_Address (16#E000_E010#);

variables.name: SYST_CVR
variables.code:
SYST_CVR   : SYST_CVR_Register
  with Import,
       Volatile,
       Full_Access_Only,
       Address => System.Storage_Elements.To_Address (16#E000_E018#);

variables.name: SYST_RVR
variables.code:
SYST_RVR   : SYST_RVR_Register
  with Import,
       Volatile,
       Full_Access_Only,
       Address => System.Storage_Elements.To_Address (16#E000_E014#);
